issues.title: Define gamification event taxonomy v1
issues.body:
Summary
Define canonical event names, properties, and shared context fields for Tier-1 gamification and ride lifecycle telemetry.

Acceptance Criteria
- Event dictionary approved by FE/BE/DA
- Tier-1 flows mapped to explicit events
- No PII in schema

issues.title: Add Riverpod gamification domain scaffold
issues.body:
Summary
Add compile-safe gamification domain scaffolding (`state`, `providers`, `orchestrator`) with no behavior change.

Acceptance Criteria
- Scaffold compiles and tests pass
- No runtime behavior change in production paths

issues.title: Build passive progress snapshot API contract
issues.body:
Summary
Expose a read-only, role-aware progress snapshot API for initial UI surfaces.

Acceptance Criteria
- FE can fetch snapshot reliably
- Contract documented and versioned

issues.title: Add post-trip passive progress card (read-only)
issues.body:
Summary
Render read-only progress feedback in post-trip summary.

Acceptance Criteria
- Card appears after trip completion
- No booking/post-trip latency regression

issues.title: Wire analytics events for existing ride lifecycle
issues.body:
Summary
Instrument key ride lifecycle events with required context metadata.

Acceptance Criteria
- >=95% expected coverage in QA logs
- Schema validation passes

issues.title: Build experiment cohort assignment service (server-side)
issues.body:
Summary
Create deterministic user cohort assignment for experiments and rollouts.

Acceptance Criteria
- Stable assignment per user
- Idempotent and auditable behavior

issues.title: QA baseline non-regression matrix for rides and routing
issues.body:
Summary
Establish baseline quality matrix before enabling Tier-1 mechanics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Critical flow regression suite passes
- Baseline report published

issues.title: Implement streak state model and grace/recovery rules
issues.body:
Summary
Implement deterministic streak transitions with fairness and replay safety.

Acceptance Criteria
- Transition matrix covered by tests
- Duplicate events do not corrupt streak state

issues.title: Implement mission definition schema and weekly scheduler
issues.body:
Summary
Create mission schema and scheduler for role/cohort weekly missions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Missions generated by policy
- Supports role and cohort variants

issues.title: Implement mission progress evaluator on ride completion
issues.body:
Summary
Process qualifying ride events to advance mission progress.

Acceptance Criteria
- Idempotent mission updates
- Progress state remains consistent under retries

issues.title: Add mission UI card to role home
issues.body:
Summary
Display active missions and completion state on role home.

Acceptance Criteria
- AR/EN localized
- Reactive updates without full-screen rebuild

issues.title: Add streak UI module and recovery affordance
issues.body:
Summary
Expose streak status, grace state, and recovery affordance in UI.

Acceptance Criteria
- Clear rule explanations in copy
- Recovery state shown accurately

issues.title: Add notification hooks for mission and streak milestones
issues.body:
Summary
Send milestone notifications with anti-spam constraints.

Acceptance Criteria
- Milestone notifications are idempotent
- User preference/throttle rules respected

issues.title: QA automation for mission and streak edge cases
issues.body:
Summary
Automate edge cases for streak breaks/recovery and mission progress race conditions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Edge-case scenarios pass in CI
- No critical regression introduced

issues.title: Implement Value Wallet calculation engine
issues.body:
Summary
Compute wallet states (`earned`, `unlocked`, `pending`) with configurable policy controls.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic calculations
- Policy inputs configurable via remote settings

issues.title: Build wallet summary and history APIs
issues.body:
Summary
Expose wallet summary and transition history endpoints for app surfaces.

Acceptance Criteria
- Summary + paginated history available
- API contract documented

issues.title: Add Value Wallet UI to home and profile/rewards
issues.body:
Summary
Render wallet summary in key user surfaces with consistent values.

Acceptance Criteria
- Values match backend across screens
- Accessibility and localization complete

issues.title: Implement Next Best Action recommendation service v1
issues.body:
Summary
Return one ranked recommendation that maximizes progress with minimal user effort.

Acceptance Criteria
- One recommendation per context
- Explainability metadata included

issues.title: Add Next Best Action card and click tracking
issues.body:
Summary
Display recommendation card and track CTA interactions by cohort.

Acceptance Criteria
- CTA shown reliably
- Open/click/outcome events captured

issues.title: Extend anti-fraud rules for gamified events
issues.body:
Summary
Harden fraud rules against synthetic progress and reward farming.

Acceptance Criteria
- New fraud rules deployed
- Monitoring for false positive/negative rates

issues.title: QA performance validation for post-trip reward processing path
issues.body:
Summary
Validate reward-processing latency and system behavior under load.

Acceptance Criteria
- P95 stays within SLO
- Core booking/ride flow unaffected

issues.title: Build neighborhood/campus team challenges (social belonging)
issues.body:
Summary
Launch social team challenges so users can join neighborhood/campus cohorts and progress together.

Acceptance Criteria
- Users can join team challenges and see team progress
- Completion logic is deterministic and idempotent
- Team challenge events are emitted for analytics

issues.title: Implement Trust + Safety mastery tracks
issues.body:
Summary
Create mastery-track progression tied to safe and reliable rider/driver behavior.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mastery progression updates correctly from qualifying actions
- Level unlocks are replay-safe and auditable
- AR/EN messaging clearly explains progression rules

issues.title: Implement smart bonus windows for off-peak and underserved routes
issues.body:
Summary
Introduce dynamic bonus windows that reward demand-shaping behaviors.

Acceptance Criteria
- Eligible users see active windows with transparent conditions
- Bonus claims are idempotent and policy-constrained
- Exposure/claim outcomes are logged for optimization

issues.title: Integrate A/B cohorts and measurement wiring across Tier-2 mechanics
issues.body:
Summary
Wire experiment cohort assignment and analytics context across team challenges, mastery tracks, and bonus windows.

Acceptance Criteria
- Tier-2 events include experiment metadata end-to-end
- At least 3 experiment slices are analyzable without manual joins
- Guardrail metrics are available for fast rollback decisions

issues.title: QA/performance validation for the full gamification stack
issues.body:
Summary
Validate reliability, accessibility, and runtime performance for Tier-1 + Tier-2 gamification together.

Acceptance Criteria
- No critical functional regressions in core ride flows
- P95 reward/gamification processing remains within agreed SLO
- QA report includes findings, risks, and rollout recommendation
